pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: I think "Bubba G" is in first place almost by accident, just staggering through like a guy who won the lottery but can't remember where he bought the ticket. Gunner's reliance on France clearly works, but it's not the mark of tactical genius when you pick one of the tournament's favorites and they actually perform well. Look, Devin—our dear "Ghost Pepper"—has impressed with Spain, but when Haiti's your fourth-round darling, it's like expecting to unlock a room with Monopoly money. Gayden, oh bless his heart, must feel vindicated by England's steady march, even if it's akin to a stopped clock being right twice a day. And, of course, we can't forget "The Noisemaker," young Rafe, who looks at soccer like a Jackson Pollock painting: full of random choices that no one understands but at least have a splash of chaotic charm. While Zach's "Mustard Boy" persona gives us vim and vigor, his declining position suggests it's more condiment than commanding. So, for today's big matchup, with all these missteps in mind, I think we can confidently predict that the winner will be the one who shows up, since that seems to be the real challenge in this pool.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden Fails To Capitalize On England's Win, Drops In Standings
pundit_takes.subtitle: Even a 2-0 victory can't fix poor management choices.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach Struggles Despite Tier 1 Brazil, Drops To Fourth Place
pundit_takes.subtitle: Drafting Brazil was genius, managing rest of team less so.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Solidifies Lead As DR Congo Triumphs Over Uzbekistan
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G quietly letting Tier 4 team do heavy lifting.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin Set To Challenge Gunner With Tier 2 USA Match
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper banking on USA to spice up his score.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's sitting pretty atop the leaderboard, but even a toddler could dethrone him.
Rafe's Tier-3 Tunisia is a trust fall with zero wins. Solid draft, kid.
Rafe embarrasses Devin with a +6 spread. The kid's really grounding Ghost Pepper.
Rafe's 12% chance of victory? The sim's clowning us all with this chaos agent.
